4687955.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_A
4687955.transcript: No Astra will sacrifice the skies on our watch!

5903230.label: PL2100_vo_CMM_charge_hold
5903230.transcript: Hold your Skybound Art for now.

16803143.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
16803143.transcript: We could've talked through our differences, but alas.

32073181.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
32073181.transcript: This island is hiding something... I can feel it.

37436637.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_2
37436637.transcript: Such mindless chaos shall not stand!

43727427.label: PL2100_vo_CMM_win_3
43727427.transcript: Excellent! Let's have coffee to celebrate!

61288754.label: PL2100_vo_CMM_emo_squat_3
61288754.transcript: Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah!

73343786.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
73343786.transcript: We will stop you! Whatever it takes!

98638151.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
98638151.transcript: We won't fall for these parlor tricks!

132171322.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
132171322.transcript: Don't let that dragon swallow you, Id!

143081191.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
143081191.transcript: They're more fragile than they appear.

171111496.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_upper_1
171111496.transcript: Your wish, your promise... I have not forgotten!

223073425.label: PL2100_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
223073425.transcript: Fine. One. Two. Three. Four. Five. Six. Are you satisfied?

237488008.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
237488008.transcript: Fear no longer binds us, beast!

257062412.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
257062412.transcript: What a foul place... But on would we press!

257864104.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
257864104.transcript: We won't turn tail and run! Not from you!

269413870.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
269413870.transcript: Let's end this! For the glory of the skies!

271726477.label: PL2100_vo_CMM_no_2
271726477.transcript: I don't see it that way.

272460278.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_C
272460278.transcript: Soulless automatons are no match for us!

299155948.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
299155948.transcript: Listen well, wolf. You will let us pass.

299543246.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
299543246.transcript: This power links us. Use it well!

322653508.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
322653508.transcript: Onward! The skies are counting on us!

324197151.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
324197151.transcript: We must lay waste to this corrupted beast!

331669831.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
331669831.transcript: It seems he knows something of combat.

364175709.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
364175709.transcript: Through these sands we press on!

371947605.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_upper_3
371947605.transcript: The light of promise shall not die!

377964632.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
377964632.transcript: We can't let him delay us!

413755860.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
413755860.transcript: Such foul magic! What is she?

430214371.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
430214371.transcript: We'll end this one way or another!

469457130.label: PL2100_vo_ETC_quest_start_2
469457130.transcript: I promise... I'll protect these skies.

490974356.label: PL2100_vo_CMM_choice
490974356.transcript: Behold the power of the supreme Primark!

498210752.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
498210752.transcript: The sky realm is under our protection!

502160567.label: PL2100_vo_ETC_comeback_2
502160567.transcript: The day is not yet lost!

514967018.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
514967018.transcript: Admit it! Your salvation is a farce!

531990608.label: PL2100_vo_CMM_emo_win_4
531990608.transcript: How foolish. They stood no chance against us.

538387236.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_B
538387236.transcript: We shall extinguish your horrific flames!

559170187.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
559170187.transcript: Everyone! Watch the skies for incoming missiles!

575596620.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
575596620.transcript: That power... what has he become?

575933937.label: PL2100_vo_CMM_charge_attack
575933937.transcript: Destroy them with your Skybound Art!

576990014.label: PL2100_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
576990014.transcript: One, two, three, four, five, six. Done.

614842176.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
614842176.transcript: We're almost across the finish line!

627120163.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_C
627120163.transcript: The tides have turned in our favor!

630925588.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_C
630925588.transcript: Spare no mercy for these villains!

635741133.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_A
635741133.transcript: Stay focused, everyone! It needs us!

638788894.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
638788894.transcript: You fools hope to defeat us? Absurd.

645947807.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
645947807.transcript: Victory is ours for the taking!

648394668.label: PL2100_vo_CMM_emo_pose_4
648394668.transcript: The skies are under my watch.

656424585.label: PL2100_vo_ETC_quest_clear_6
656424585.transcript: Go on. Bask in my power.

660478839.label: PL2100_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
660478839.transcript: Push-ups. One. Two. Three. Four. Five. Six. Well, that'll suffice.

667773162.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
667773162.transcript: Behold! The power of the supreme Primarch!

676572488.label: PL2100_vo_ETC_quest_clear_5
676572488.transcript: Were all our quests so smooth?

704166922.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
704166922.transcript: It's like cutting through the void itself!

717712973.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_B
717712973.transcript: We will find the catalyst. Mark my words.

718718132.label: PL2100_vo_CMM_win_2
718718132.transcript: Well, we have prevailed once more.

727854823.label: PL2100_vo_CMM_emo_pose_2
727854823.transcript: Never fear! I'm at your side!

733823907.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
733823907.transcript: Impede us at your own doom!

735436436.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_3
735436436.transcript: By these radiant wings, we shall prevail!

748272900.label: PL2100_vo_CMM_readiness_2
748272900.transcript: Shall we get a move on?

756917374.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_upper_2
756917374.transcript: I made you a promise... and I intend to keep it!

764550691.label: PL2100_vo_ETC_quest_clear_4
764550691.transcript: Hmph. I give us passing marks.

792396283.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_C
792396283.transcript: You will pay for your sins!

837808928.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
837808928.transcript: I won't suffer this continued pestering!

851888518.label: PL2100_vo_NAV_get_snp_3
851888518.transcript: I dub thee Pensington the Third!

883242251.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
883242251.transcript: It's now or never! Give it everything you've got!

889585838.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
889585838.transcript: Return Lyria to us or suffer!

891948378.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
891948378.transcript: Hold fast! It poses no threat to us!

930487649.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
930487649.transcript: Thankfully its soft spots are obvious.

933824251.label: PL2100_vo_ETC_quest_clear_2
933824251.transcript: How about a relaxing cup of coffee?

954974670.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
954974670.transcript: Continue the assault! We will prevail!

964974052.label: PL2100_vo_CMM_emo_pose_3
964974052.transcript: The supreme primarch shall not falter.

970381411.label: PL2100_vo_CMM_first
970381411.transcript: This will be my first time. Go easy on me.

1023692625.label: PL2100_vo_CMM_friend
1023692625.transcript: I think I would like to be friends.

1039711451.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_1
1039711451.transcript: Let judgment ring across the land!

1041053143.label: PL2100_vo_CMM_emo_win_3
1041053143.transcript: Well, who's up for a coffee break?

1056532422.label: PL2100_vo_NAV_enemy_crush_parts_2
1056532422.transcript: Good. Now to destroy the rest!

27204004.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
27204004.transcript: That's high praise coming from the Rose Queen herself.

45376470.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
45376470.transcript: That hidden power of yours is impressive.

75691554.label: PL2100_vo_SP_oc_talk1_1
75691554.transcript: I am the end of all calamity!

118305004.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1100
118305004.transcript: You put amazing force behind your strikes.

128956884.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
128956884.transcript: Let's focus on the task at hand, please.

139907008.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
139907008.transcript: Hmph. The forces of the dead are truly formidable.

141760357.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
141760357.transcript: Is there any other way to strike?

189104605.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
189104605.transcript: There's no rest for the wicked.

245737711.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
245737711.transcript: This crew is under my protection.

266727733.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1900
266727733.transcript: We must right the wrongs of the past.

279436318.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1000
279436318.transcript: Your armor is quite unique. It suits you.

307348734.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0000
307348734.transcript: I sense you're still holding back.

387085777.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
387085777.transcript: I'm sure you're the sky dweller who could actually use them.

388606583.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
388606583.transcript: Are you ready for the next fight, Lancelot?

398204137.label: PL2100_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_3
398204137.transcript: We need you at our side.

400224022.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
400224022.transcript: Only the righteous... I... I wonder if that includes me.

400808203.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
400808203.transcript: It burns different to me, Kyles. As if it's fueled by lordly passion.

400905826.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
400905826.transcript: I've spent much time watching over these skies.

404895170.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
404895170.transcript: In strength of loyalty, you are already second to none.

410171418.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
410171418.transcript: Hmm. Truer words were never spoken.

417605036.label: PL2100_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_PL0900
417605036.transcript: I'll give it everything I've got!

453212002.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1600
453212002.transcript: Thank you for the support, Zeta.

457437220.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
457437220.transcript: Seems you've only grown more agile with age.

469451528.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
469451528.transcript: Perhaps we should address your negative image.

498126663.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B
498126663.transcript: Then let's maintain our good form.

500291814.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
500291814.transcript: Such destructive force... Show our foes your strength!

531891718.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0400
531891718.transcript: Io, you are a powerful ally.

534607783.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
534607783.transcript: I never expected to fight alongside an astral again.

559781479.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
559781479.transcript: Quite the bestial strikes you have.

574170550.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0000
574170550.transcript: We can't rest easy yet, Captain.

577758030.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
577758030.transcript: Thank you. Now who else wants our wrath?

583768456.label: PL2100_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_B
583768456.transcript: We should put some distance between us!

592893442.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A
592893442.transcript: I am a Primarch after all.

594945081.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0600
594945081.transcript: I should've known the Rose Queen would be fearsome.

599884795.label: PL2100_vo_ETC_lockon_5
599884795.transcript: The light of hope will not die!

634452033.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
634452033.transcript: They stood no chance against your Skydweller magic.

645300059.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_1
645300059.transcript: There's more where that came from!

677625310.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
677625310.transcript: You attack with such reckless abandon. Should I be concerned?

679710117.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
679710117.transcript: I was once envious of them too.

696612959.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
696612959.transcript: I would follow your flame anywhere.

702029544.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0800
702029544.transcript: Beautiful footwork. Our foes stood no chance.

731375376.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0900
731375376.transcript: The real battle is just getting started!

732377541.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
732377541.transcript: We've come far, but you remain steadfast.

742104581.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
742104581.transcript: Experience is everything. You're proof of that.

757325592.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
757325592.transcript: Your wish is my command, Rolan.

768108051.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0600
768108051.transcript: Rosetta, may I have the next dance as well?

775108704.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
775108704.transcript: I wouldn't put this burden on anyone.

814416454.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
814416454.transcript: Should I show you my limits?

816327202.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
816327202.transcript: Let us continue with renewed vigor!

823916501.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
823916501.transcript: I dare say you know something of awesome power yourself.

844442112.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0800
844442112.transcript: It was an honor to see your legendary speed firsthand.

904323822.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
904323822.transcript: High praise from the founder of alchemy herself.

908439382.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
908439382.transcript: I could say the same of you, Narmaya.

913497482.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_NP0300
913497482.transcript: Your light magic is a superb compliment to my own.

934177661.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0800
934177661.transcript: I could say the same of you.

937397585.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
937397585.transcript: And they shall have what for again and again until none remain.

950302880.label: PN2100_vo_ATK_ability_3_charge_3
950302880.transcript: By the light of the angels!

966410987.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
966410987.transcript: Quiet. I would keep your distance.

969178837.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
969178837.transcript: Indeed, we took the upper hand.

969603648.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
969603648.transcript: We can't afford anything less on the battlefield.

976596737.label: PL2100_vo_SP_pl_offset1_1
976596737.transcript: Guide me! Direct me! By your light!

990714825.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
990714825.transcript: To think even I could not keep up with you.

1000983546.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0400
1000983546.transcript: Your magic grows ever more fearsome.

1021815411.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
1021815411.transcript: That act of yours endears you to no one.

1044412042.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
1044412042.transcript: I was correct to trust your swordplay.

1065267301.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
1065267301.transcript: Unless my eyes deceive me, you're capable of the same speed.

1066701038.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
1066701038.transcript: This Skytreader could give Uriel a run for his money.

1067938608.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0900
1067938608.transcript: We can't let even a single foe escape!

27056266.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
27056266.transcript: You had that brewing for a while, didn't you?

64747673.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
64747673.transcript: Divine strength comes in all sizes, it seems.

77285393.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
77285393.transcript: I'm assuming that's a good thing.

86507469.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
86507469.transcript: Shall we break for coffee when time permits?

121388993.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2600
121388993.transcript: What if you tried fight smarter, not harder?

122632333.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
122632333.transcript: To control a full flock of blades as if it were nothing... you have my respect.

154426187.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
154426187.transcript: Seems you've grown accustomed to your powers.

154639616.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
154639616.transcript: I made it extra sweet. Your taste buds will thank me.

170351071.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
170351071.transcript: Your command over dark powers... it's impressive.

192345552.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
192345552.transcript: I'll treat you to a cup after we've cleaned up here.

204037557.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
204037557.transcript: High praise from the Lord of Flames!

221708775.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
221708775.transcript: Any foe you can't hunt down?

230934105.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
230934105.transcript: All because you adapt so well to my techniques.

237743307.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
237743307.transcript: Get out of my wings, boy! Out!

247426150.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
247426150.transcript: It takes a greater strength to protect than to destroy.

252313654.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
252313654.transcript: The consequence of fusing our powers, no doubt.

260254541.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
260254541.transcript: If not magic, then how is that lightning generated?

265155199.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
265155199.transcript: All for the sake of peace.

265359368.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
265359368.transcript: You've a gift with aerial combat.

279102449.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
279102449.transcript: The growth of your prowess has been a delight to observe.

284548032.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
284548032.transcript: Don't be absurd! Now's not the time!

345572560.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2400
345572560.transcript: Such power could rival the Archangels.

367913751.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
367913751.transcript: You're a true fusion of power and finesse.

389001253.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
389001253.transcript: You're just toying with them at this point.

395009636.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0000
395009636.transcript: The unity of our crew bolsters me.

412776627.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
412776627.transcript: My power is yours. Use it wisely.

427232246.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0500
427232246.transcript: Your eyesight may rival that of even an angel.

444755540.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
444755540.transcript: Since time immemorial, the six dragons have protected these skies.

464555424.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
464555424.transcript: Your flattery won't work on me.

499744485.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
499744485.transcript: No less merciful than a reaper.

543917984.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
543917984.transcript: Yes! Battle to your heart's content!

564055623.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
564055623.transcript: Call me by that name again, and I'm leaving.

580492551.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
580492551.transcript: General, consider not staring at me with such bloodlust.

600870290.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0900
600870290.transcript: When observing your deeds, the word "courageous" comes to mind.

614107721.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
614107721.transcript: I am grateful for your aid.

661338197.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
661338197.transcript: I fear your potential knows no bounds.

691032797.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
691032797.transcript: It's more valuable than you could ever know.

703809207.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
703809207.transcript: If you practiced more restraint, cleanup would be far easier.

705412495.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
705412495.transcript: An appropriate combination should dissuade our foes.

706504562.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
706504562.transcript: Amazing how even mere pets can prove so stalwart.

711088207.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
711088207.transcript: Yes. For power corrupts when left to its own devices.

717295545.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
717295545.transcript: That was quite the powerful blow!

725258896.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
725258896.transcript: You remind me of Uriel, the Primarch of Earth.

732293406.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2700
732293406.transcript: We must bring peace and quiet to the skies.

763378429.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
763378429.transcript: May we claim many victories in the battles to come.

780506430.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
780506430.transcript: Thank you. Your empathy is welcome.

790884997.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
790884997.transcript: Black of the Six Dragons, with domain over darkness.

808173451.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
808173451.transcript: To be blunt, you actually work well with others.

852858065.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
852858065.transcript: And yours is the edge betwixt life and death.

890049371.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2600
890049371.transcript: Give them no room to breathe!

945798892.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
945798892.transcript: The power of these wings serves the skies.

1017735182.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0300
1017735182.transcript: You have quite the talent, helmsman.

1042666618.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
1042666618.transcript: Don't mention it. Let us move on.

1060188999.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
1060188999.transcript: Understood, but mind your own health as well.

1068883552.label: PL2100_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
1068883552.transcript: Perhaps our lessons were too strict.

49265900.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
49265900.transcript: Stay vigilant. There's more to be done.

114196529.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
114196529.transcript: And this was only a fraction of my capabilities.

120159444.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2300
120159444.transcript: With your support, I have nothing to fear.

398418751.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
398418751.transcript: The Eternals are certainly a mighty bunch.

468040844.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
468040844.transcript: I like to leave a bold impression.

530850092.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
530850092.transcript: Let me stop you right there.

800812813.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
800812813.transcript: Seofon, that looked suspiciously easy for you.

962017134.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
962017134.transcript: Where would you be without us?

985291689.label: PL2100_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
985291689.transcript: Seofon, I insist you fight at your actual level next time.
